queries.question: List all patios and also display verandas with 50 seats.
queries.sql:
SELECT Patios.name
FROM Patios
UNION
SELECT Verandas.name
FROM Verandas
WHERE Verandas.Number_of_Seats = 50

queries.question: Display patios and verandas with 50 seats.
queries.sql:
SELECT Patios.name
FROM Patios
WHERE Patios.Number_of_Seats = 50
UNION
SELECT Verandas.name
FROM Verandas
WHERE Verandas.Number_of_Seats = 50

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display patios and verandas with 50 seats.
